---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a non-normative improvement (documentation, examples, tooling)
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: ''
---

> For **normative spec changes** (verbs, schemas, tier definitions, trust verification order), please use the *Spec change* template instead. This template is for non-normative improvements.

## What would you like to see?

One-sentence summary.

## Why?

Who benefits, and how? Include concrete use cases.

## Proposed approach

What does the change look like? File-level diff sketches welcome.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you consider, and why is this the best option?

## Impact

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Examples / fixtures
- [ ] Conformance runner
- [ ] Tooling
- [ ] Other: `_____`

## Additional context

References, prior art, etc.
